raw_response:
Tool Call: retrieve("kwashiorkor characteristics")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Based on the gathered evidence, I find **\boxed{D}**, all of the statements listed accurately reflect aspects of Kwashiorkor. Specifically, Kwashiorkor involves a deficiency of protein alongside sufficient caloric intake (\(A\)), predominantly occurs in young children around \(6 - 36\) months of age (\(B\)), shows preservation of subcutaneous fat while experiencing muscle atrophy (\(C\)). Since all parts align correctly according to current understanding and evidence, my agreement stands firm with prior conclusions. No new reasons were found compelling enough to alter existing consensus amongst healthcare professionals defining Kwashiorkor clinically.
Therefore, maintaining consistency across discussions, \(\boxed{D}\) encapsulates the essence of what constitutes Kwashiorkor effectively.
